issues: ProgressionManager had no auth call at all — no device_id generation, no JWT acquisition, no token/player_id storage
loadFromCloud and _putWithRetry called /save (no playerId) without Authorization header, making auth impossible
fixes: Added initAuth() method to ProgressionManager: generates/persists device_id, detects platform, POST /auth/anonymous, stores JWT in localStorage('glow_auth_token') and player_id in localStorage('glow_player_id')
Added getAuthToken() and getPlayerId() public accessors

issues: Response fields not mapped: backend returns beach_coins/glowstone but client expected beachCoins/glowstones
fixes: loadFromCloud now fetches /save/${playerId} using stored player_id
Added mapping of server currency fields: beach_coins→beachCoins, glowstone→glowstones

issues: PUT body sent entire GameProgress object with wrong field names: currency.beachCoins (should be currency.beach_coins), currency.glowstones (should be currency.glowstone), lastUpdatedAt (should be client_updated_at as top-level field)
fixes: Constructed apiBody with correct field names: client_updated_at, currency.beach_coins, currency.glowstone, chapter_progress, materials

issues: LeaderboardResponse typed my_rank as 'number' but backend returns object { rank, total_score, chapter_reached }
LeaderboardResponse typed my_entry field which does not exist in backend response
_renderMyRank read data.my_rank as a number (e.g. #${data.my_rank}) instead of data.my_rank.rank
_renderMyRank read data.my_entry.display_name which doesn't exist in backend response
Fetch did not pass player_id query param so backend never returned my_rank
No Authorization header on leaderboard fetch
fixes: Replaced 'my_rank?: number' and 'my_entry?' with correct 'my_rank?: MyRank | null' where MyRank = { rank, total_score, chapter_reached }
Added MyRank interface matching backend response shape
Display name falls back to entries list lookup or '我' (no fabricated my_entry dependency)
_loadLeaderboard now passes player_id query param when available
Added Authorization header from localStorage glow_auth_token

issues: POST /iap/verify requires authentication (preHandler: app.authenticate) but client sent no Authorization header
Error code 'invalid_receipt' referenced in purchase() return but backend uses 'RECEIPT_INVALID' — client code uses generic string 'RECEIPT_INVALID' which is consistent
fixes: verifyWithBackend now reads JWT from localStorage('glow_auth_token') and sends Authorization: Bearer header

spec_reconciliation.note: Spec records 30-day lifetime; backend signs with expiresIn '7d'. reconciliation_notes field added to endpoint in api-spec.json.
